title: cotoneaster wilsonii
intro: Cotoneaster wilsonii, also known as Wilson's cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cotoneaster wilsonii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's berries, leaves, and stems are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often employed in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
